name: &be UV Primer Rich Moist
pros: Excellent value at ¥1,650—delivers SPF50+ PA++++ protection with primer benefits
Non-chemical (ノンケミカル) formula gentler on sensitive skin than most competitors
Doubles as makeup primer and moisturizing base, reducing product layers
cons: 390 reviews suggest mixed results—some report pilling under heavy makeup application
Less established brand recognition compared to Shiseido or SK-II in Japan
shortDescription: Affordable hybrid UV primer that combines sun protection with skincare in one step.
review: &be offers genuine value for expats on a budget who want broad-spectrum protection without chemical UV filters. The primer function is genuinely useful for makeup application, though the high volume of reviews (390) reveals some users experience pilling or uneven application. It's a solid alternative to premium options if you're willing to accept slightly less brand prestige.
